title: Living in Boulder vlog 8 - 12 - 18: Organizing home to Exercise Stream

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about setting up a streaming and exercise system in his Boulder home. He discusses acquiring OBS software, an Elgato stream deck, a Wahoo KICKR (watt bike), and an electric bike, with plans to stream himself working and cycling simultaneously. He also talks about organizing his home to fit more bikes and improving his personal website with fitness tracking.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: ideal multitasking — the future of how to work
useful for climbing hills and riding with visitors; interesting to experiment with vs road bike fitness
wants it looking good but anxious about it being embarrassing before he has time to improve it
